---
name: release-prepare
description: Prepare a Bowties release by detecting the current version, asking for the next version, reviewing docs, updating release files, validating, and staging commit/tag steps.
argument-hint: Optional target version override, for example 0.2.0
agent: release-prepare
---

Prepare a Bowties release following [docs/project/releasing.md](../../docs/project/releasing.md).
